package handler

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"net/http"
)

type NegativeQueryPathAndBodyMergeRequest struct {
	ID       string `json:"id" uri:"id"`
	TenantID string `json:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string `json:"status"`
}

func NegativeQueryPathAndBodyMergePerformedInHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	var req NegativeQueryPathAndBodyMergeRequest
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid body"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"id": req.ID, "status": req.Status})
}
